name: obsidian-quickadd
title: Obsidian QuickAdd
description: Run Obsidian QuickAdd choices from Raycast.
author: gaoyang

commands.name: quickadd
commands.title: Search QuickAdd Choices
commands.subtitle: Obsidian
commands.description: Search and run QuickAdd choices across your Obsidian vaults.

commands.name: quickadd-with-text
commands.title: Send to QuickAdd
commands.subtitle: Obsidian
commands.description: Send text from Raycast Root Search to a QuickAdd choice.

preferences.name: vaultPath
preferences.title: Vault Path
preferences.description: Optional Obsidian vault directory. Its folder name is used as the vault name.

preferences.name: defaultVariableName
preferences.title: Default Variable Name
preferences.description: The QuickAdd variable name used in the URI parameter value-<name>.
